name: mijia-control-codex
description: Codex plugin that routes Xiaomi and Mijia smart-home work through mijia-control only.

interface.shortDescription: Control Xiaomi/Mijia devices only through mijia-control.
interface.longDescription: Adds a Codex skill and local MCP wiring for hands-off Xiaomi and Mijia smart-home operations through the upstream mijia-control project. The plugin does not store credentials or device identifiers.
defaultPrompt: List my Mijia devices through mijia-control.
Check a Xiaomi device property safely.
Run a Mijia scene through the MCP server.
